context: The user has submitted a C++ pull request containing multiple potential memory leaks.

empathic_chain.observation: The user has asked the same basic syntax question three times consecutively.
empathic_chain.feeling: I empathize with their urgency to resolve the issue and their dissatisfaction.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs to quickly understand core concepts and build technical confidence.
empathic_chain.request: Directly point out the risky lines of code and provide refactoring suggestions that include best practices.

output_format: Empathic response -> Issue breakdown -> Action plan
